items.notes: Replace with an approved local Meetily recording or imported audio file plus transcripts.json and optional human RTTM.
Use a meeting-like recording with enough turns from each speaker to evaluate clustering stability.
Use poor microphone, room noise, compression, or far-field speech to stress missed speech and false alarms.
Use interruptions, crosstalk, or back-and-forth overlap to test overlap preservation separately from flattened labels.
Use a call where remote participants dominate the mixed system-audio path.
Use similar-sounding speakers or short acknowledgements to test speaker confusion and turn churn.
